title: Lesson 558: 放す, 離れる, 羽...

items.gloss: to release; to let go; to free; to set free; to let loose; to turn loose; to add (pieces of eggplant, potato, etc.) to water, broth, etc.
to be separated; to be apart; to be distant; to leave; to go away; to leave (a job, etc.); to quit; to give up; to lose connection with; to drift away from
feather; plume; down; wing; blade (of a fan, propeller, etc.); shuttlecock (in badminton); shuttlecock (in hanetsuki); arrow feathers
fifth degree (of the Japanese and Chinese pentatonic scale)
width; breadth; freedom (e.g. of thought); latitude; gap; difference (e.g. in price); range (e.g. of voice)
